steps.title: Determine the slope sign
steps.content: The line of best fit goes downward from left to right, so its slope is negative.

steps.title: Estimate the steepness
steps.content: Using two clear points on the line, the line falls by about $1.1$ units for each increase of $1$ unit in $x$. So the slope is closest to $-1.1$. The answer is B.
